title: Six-way scrum for Ward 8 by-election
description: KNYSNA NEWS - There will be a six-way tussle...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - There will be a six-way tussle in Knysna Ward 8's by-election on 25 June.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - There will be a six-way tussle in Knysna Ward 8's by-election on 25 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ANC's Aubrey Tsengwa, who resigned from the seat after he was ousted as mayor in February, faces the MK, PA, KIM, EFF and Land Party.","html":"The ANC's Aubrey Tsengwa, who resigned from the seat after he was ousted as mayor in February, faces the MK, PA, KIM, EFF and Land Party."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tsengwa won the seat in the 2021 local government elections, garnering just over 73% of the vote, with his nearest rival then being the ACDP with 0.23%.","html":"Tsengwa won the seat in the 2021 local government elections, garnering just over 73% of the vote, with his nearest rival then being the ACDP with 0.23%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Magdalena Rosetta-Moos (PA).Photo: Supplied","html":"Magdalena Rosetta-Moos (PA).Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The full list of candidates is:","html":"The full list of candidates is:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Ndoda Tsengwa (ANC)","html":"• Ndoda Tsengwa (ANC)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Mkululi Pasi (EFF)","html":"• Mkululi Pasi (EFF)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mkululi Pasi (EFF).Photo: Supplied","html":"Mkululi Pasi (EFF).Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Elmarie Maxim (KIM)","html":"• Elmarie Maxim (KIM)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elmarie Maxim (KIM).Photo: Supplied","html":"Elmarie Maxim (KIM).Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Thozama Ngxwashula-Mali, (LP)","html":"• Thozama Ngxwashula-Mali, (LP)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Magdalena Rosetta-Moos (PA)","html":"• Magdalena Rosetta-Moos (PA)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Vuyisile Boy-Boy Sonjani (MK).","html":"• Vuyisile Boy-Boy Sonjani (MK)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
